name: Rectangle
description: Free open-source window manager for macOS with keyboard shortcuts and drag-to-snap — based on Spectacle.

seo.title: Rectangle — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Rectangle: Free open-source window manager for macOS with keyboard shortcuts and drag-to-snap — based on Spectacle.

when_to_use: macOS window snapping with keyboard shortcuts and drag zones
Free Spectacle-based window manager for developer workflows
Half/quarter-screen layout shortcuts for focused coding
Open-source alternative to Magnet for window management
Custom keyboard shortcut tiling for multi-monitor Mac setup

pros: Free open-source window snapping for macOS
Keyboard shortcuts cover every tiling action
Drag-to-snap feels native to the OS
Pro version adds cascade and custom grids
cons: macOS only, no Linux or Windows
Lacks advanced tiling of Yabai or Amethyst
No automation API for scripted layouts
review.verdict: The default Mac window manager for most users — free, reliable, and good enough to forget it's running.
review.best_for: macOS users who want keyboard-driven window snapping without config hassle
review.not_for: Power users who want full i3-style tiling window management
